zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Clifford於大約1189年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親Walter de Clifford II42歲，母親Agnes Condet30歲。他於1217年2月20日之前與Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1231年8月28日之前在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾比 多雷，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Clifford于大约1189年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲Walter de Clifford II42岁，母亲Agnes Condet30岁。他于1217年2月20日之前与Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham在英国英格兰賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1231年8月28日之前在英国英格兰賀福爾艾比 多雷，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Clifford was born about 1189, in Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter de Clifford II, was 42 and his mother, Agnes Condet, was 30. He married Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham before 20 February 1217, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 28 August 1231, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Clifford est né environ 1189, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Clifford II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes Condet, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham avant 20 février 1217, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 28 août 1231, à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham prima del 20 febbraio 1217, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Cliffordが約1189年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter de Clifford IIは42歳，母Agnes Condetは30歳であった。1217年2月20日以前にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドでSibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burnehamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1231年8月28日以前にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンランベスサイント マリー チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity And Saint Mary Churchyard,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Clifford(이)가 대략 1189년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Clifford II(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Condet(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1217년 2월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1231년 8월 28일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1189, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Clifford II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Condet, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham antes 20 de fevereiro de 1217, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 28 de agosto de 1231, em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holy Trinity And Saint Mary Churchyard,: сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Clifford родился около 1189 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Clifford II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Condet, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham перед 20 февраль 1217 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 28 августа 1231 г. в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Clifford nació aproximadamente 1189, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Clifford II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnes Condet, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham antes de 20 de febrero de 1217, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 28 de agosto de 1231, en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
